profile: 20 Microns Limited, India’s largest industrial minerals manufacturer, produces Calcium Carbonate in India, Malaysia, Vietnam and imports via OEM trade from Egypt, along with white fillers like Talc, Barytes and Mica etc. Its subsidiary, 20 Microns Nano Minerals offers waxes & processing additives, antiblocking agents, opacity pigments, Blancfix, ATH, MDH, and Calcium Oxide desiccants for polymer and rubber industries.
